target.label: Story 2.2 — Implement scripts/build-licenses.mjs generator + Sage Round-1 architectural addendum

sources: Sage Round-1 closer report (lands in PR #24): projects/deepnest-next/reviews/2-2-implement-scripts-build-licenses-mjs-generator-script-round-1.md

other.note: doc-verification + runtime-verification: (a) 2× post-merge regen-byte-equivalence runs (sha256 stable, matches committed file); (b) clean-tree licenses:check exit-0; (c) mutate-restore licenses:check exit-1 with unified-diff stderr; (d) 5× cold-process generator wall-clock samples (median ~178 ms, all <1 s budget); (e) git-diff/git-show structural verifications across the 11 touched files; (f) Sage Round-1 deterministic pre-flight checklist (15 checks all PASS); (g) §16 anti-pattern hot-greps; (h) CI step-wall-clock at 2 SHAs (PR f40843f + push-to-main 74a795f). Generator-script story per story-file Tasks/Subtasks 11.4: 'npm run licenses:check locally — must exit 0' is the canonical structural check; the actual scripts.test wire-in is Story 2.3 (A4).

recommendations.action: Story 2.3 / A4 scope-add — fold Sage Round-1 P2-04 (parser/drift test harness) into A4 spec; A4 is the natural moment since it wires licenses:check into scripts.test. Recommend onFail(code, msg) injection so cases run in-process via node:test or Playwright without per-case child-process spawn.

ADR-008 amendment bundle (single commit) folding 5 wording-alignment items: canonical rendering rule (Sage P2-01); LICENSE_YML_FILES = configured-roots list (Sage P2-02); closed-set drift-gate caveat in §Risk (Sage P2-03); §271 line-anchor → subsection-title cross-reference (Sage P3-01); 'no runtime deps beyond fs/path' → 'Node stdlib only' (Sage P3-02). Story 2.3's natural moment.

Wall-clock CI guard on licenses:check once Story 2.3 wires the gate (Hermes Finding 1 / Sage P3-06). Proposed threshold 750 ms wall on canonical CI cell (12× margin under §3.3 1 s ceiling). Owner: Murat (TEA) on Story 2.3.
Optional cosmetic polish in Story 2.3 / A4 PR or Story 2.4 docs pass: drift-diff truncation honesty (Lydia P3-03), renderTable allocation pattern (Lydia P3-04), --help / -h exit code (Lydia P3-05).

Closer PR #24 (DEE-92-closer-sage-report-2-2 → main) is OPEN at trace time. When merged it lands sprint-status flip ready-for-dev → done + last_updated refresh + Sage Round-1 consolidated report. AC-02.2.10's done-flip portion completes on closer merge; trace verdict stands independently.
